title: pholiurus incurvus
intro: Pholiurus incurvus, commonly known as the bent grass or bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pholiurus incurvus include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to reduce inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, Pholiurus incurvus can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
